sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106324" key="u(deriw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδερ-ιώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n106324.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suffering from dropsy,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:27:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.27.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
